EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The administrator {subject.name} from host {src.host} modified a rule of the "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.id}
The administrator {subject.name} from host {src.host} modified the rule "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.id}
The administrator {subject.name} from host {src.host} modified the rule "{object.name}" on host {event_src.id}
